channel.title: Data Science on JooYoung Seo: a Learning Scientist for Inclusive Learning Ecologies
channel.description: Recent content in Data Science on JooYoung Seo: a Learning Scientist for Inclusive Learning Ecologies

item.title: Initial Post
item.description: Three Available Packages Specialized for Visually Impaired R Users There are three packages for the blind R users (Godfrey, Warren, Murrell, Bilton, & Sorge, 2018; Seo, 2017; Siegert & Williams, 2017). Methods Creswell (2014) suggests a mixed methods study as a balanced methodology between qualitative and quantitative research. Basic Histogram See Figure ?? made by base R: hist(airquality$Ozone, col='lightgreen') VI(hist(airquality$Ozone)) sonify(1:5, 1:5) Ggplot Will be added later soon.
